data.title: Semler Scientific Unveils Bold Plan to Acquire 105,000 Bitcoin by 2027

The Nasdaq-listed healthcare technology firm announced Thursday the appointment of Joe Burnett as its new Director of Bitcoin Strategy, marking […] The post Semler Scientific Unveils Bold Plan to Acquire 105,000 Bitcoin by 2027 appeared first on Coindoo.

data.title: Jump Crypto publishes a long article after two years: Low-key for several years but still building, still full of enthusiasm for the future of the industry
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Jump Crypto published a long article "Re-introduction to Jump Crypto" on its official website.
Jump Crypto said in the article: "In the past few years, we have maintained a low public exposure, but never stopped building... The reason for publishing this article now is that we believe that now is the best time to build a new financial track and a new coordination layer. This is not only a technical issue, but policies are also catching up. Policymakers and regulators are now open to the potential of the cryptocurrency industry... We are still here, we are still building, and we are still enthusiastic about the future of this industry." Odaily Note: Jump Crypto's last post on the official website dates back to 2023.

data.title: Sui Ecosystem Protocol Momentum TVL exceeds 97 million USD, ranking first on Sui DEX
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News DefiLlama data shows that the TVL of the SUI chain native ve (3,3) DEX protocol Momentum continues to set new highs, breaking through 97 million US dollars. Only 80 days after the protocol was launched, its TVL has jumped to the first place in Sui DEX.

data.title: Economic Observer: CNH stablecoin may be promoted in three stages based on the experience of RMB business pilot
data.description: The Economic Observer published an article titled "How to Break the Hong Kong Trial of Offshore RMB Stablecoins", which pointed out that the Hong Kong Stablecoin Ordinance is expected to be implemented in August, which may indicate that the trial of offshore RMB (CNH) stablecoins is approaching. Referring to the experience of the RMB business pilot in 2003, the implementation of CNH stablecoins can be promoted in three stages: First, sandbox trials (2025-2026): Chinese licensed institutions will pilot the issuance of CNH stablecoins for use in trade scenarios in the Greater Bay Area; Second, regional expansion (2026-2027): access to cross-border projects such as mBridge (Multilateral Central Bank Digital Currency Bridge), while piloting RWA (real world asset) applications such as bond tokenization; Third, global promotion (from 2028): jointly with international organizations such as the IMF (International Monetary Fund) to formulate technical and regulatory standards to promote CNH stablecoins as regional commodity pricing tools. (Economic Observer)

data.title: Massive Data Breach Hits Billions of Logins Across Google, Facebook and GitHub
data.description:
A data breach including over 16 billion passwords has sent a shockwave through the tech world as users scramble to protect themselves.
source: https://decrypt.co/326163/data-breach-hits-billions-logins-google-facebook-github

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 60 Million Tokens on Ethereum
data.description: According to Foresight News, Whale Alert has reported that the USDC Treasury has destroyed 60 million USDC tokens on the Ethereum blockchain. This action is part of ongoing efforts to manage the supply of the stablecoin and maintain its peg to the U.S. dollar. The destruction of tokens is a common practice in the cryptocurrency industry to ensure stability and control inflation. The move reflects the Treasury's commitment to maintaining the value and integrity of USDC in the market.

data.title: Crypto market reaction to middle east tensions leaves investors on edge
data.description:
20-6-2025 – The cryptocurrency market is weathering a storm of uncertainty, with Bitcoin and Ethereum clinging to stability after a sharp tumble triggered by escalating tensions in the Middle East. Since the Israel-Iran conflict flared on June 3, Bitcoin has slipped 3% to hover around $104,000, while Ethereum has endured a steeper 10% drop, settling [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/crypto-market-reaction-to-middle-east-tensions-leaves-investors-on-edge/

data.title: GT rose by 10.62% and is now trading at $17.158
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: The latest market data shows that the Gate platform currency GateToken (GT) has expanded its increase to 10.62% in the past 24 hours and is currently trading at US$17.158.

data.title: CoinList to Launch Pipe Network (PIPE) Token Sale on June 27
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News CoinList will start the Pipe Network (PIPE) token sale on June 27. The PIPE FDV is $450 million, the total sales volume is 30 million, the unit price of the token is $0.25 and $0.2, and the purchase limit is a minimum of $100 and a maximum of $2.5 million.
Among them, Option 1 FDV is $250 million, 100% unlocked at TGE; Option 2 FDV is $200 million, 100% unlocked 1 year after TGE.
After the purchase period ends, the team will distribute it according to the "Filling from the bottom" distribution method. Users who do not win the lottery will receive a refund in their CoinList wallet within 48 hours.

data.title: USDC Treasury destroys 60 million USDC on Ethereum
data.description: WhaleAlert monitoring shows that 2 minutes ago, USDC Treasury destroyed 60 million USDC on the Ethereum chain.

This recent divestment represents a continuation of a pattern established earlier this year, when the [. .
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/trump-wlfi-share-sale-cuts-stake-to-40-amid-1-7b-valuation/

data.title: USDC now live on XRP ledger via Uphold
data.description:
Uphold has integrated USDC on the XRP Ledger (XRPL), enabling users to transfer USDC between Uphold and XRPL wallets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/usdc-now-live-on-xrp-ledger-via-uphold/

data.title: Artemis founder: USDC market value may exceed $370 billion in 2029
data.description: Jon Ma, founder of Artemis, a cryptocurrency institutional data platform, posted on the X platform that Circle Payment Network (CPN) has been added as a revenue item. Data predicts that the scale of B2B payments will exceed US$570 billion in 2029. If 20% of it is in CPN, then 0.1% of the commission income will flow to Circle. In addition, according to the current stablecoin market growth rate forecast, if the stablecoin supply in 2029 increases by 30% year-on-year to US$1.2 trillion, based on USDC's 28.5% stablecoin market share, its market value may exceed US$370 billion, a year-on-year increase of 32%.

data.title: Airwallex CEO: It's time to short Circle
data.description: Jack Zhang, co-founder and CEO of corporate payment and financial platform Airwallex, wrote on X: "It's time to short Circle." Previously, Jack Zhang had published an article questioning the practicality of stablecoins in cross-border transactions of mainstream currencies.

data.title: Planet Morning News
A whale sold 2.18 million FARTCOIN today, worth $2.3 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Lookonchain monitoring shows that whale 73FtSU sold 2.18 million FARTCOIN purchased 2 months ago at an average price of $1.06 today, worth $2.3 million, with a profit of about $251,000.

data.title: Jupiter DAO: Voting will be suspended until the end of 2025 to focus on products and community
data.description: Jupiter DAO officially announced on X that it will suspend voting until the end of 2025 to focus on developing Jupiter products and the community. Active Staking Rewards (ASR) will be extended to the end of 2025, and all stakers will receive rewards.

data.title: LayerZero has launched a second referendum on whether to turn on the "fee switch"
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News LayerZero has launched a second referendum on whether to turn on the "fee switch". The vote will decide whether to activate the LayerZero protocol fee, which will be used to repurchase ZRO and destroy it. The vote will end on June 27.

data.title: Revolut Explores Launching Its Own Stablecoin Amid Regulatory Changes
data.description: According to PANews, London-based neobank Revolut is actively exploring the issuance of its own stablecoin. Sources familiar with the matter have revealed that Revolut is in discussions with at least one crypto-native company. In recent years, as regulatory environments in the United States and globally have evolved, an increasing number of non-crypto companies are considering the issuance of stablecoins. Revolut currently serves over 55 million retail customers and 500,000 business clients across 160 countries.
